passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 people at half price.
Things to know before you reserve:
Funded by We're One Wilmington (WOW)
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 4 people at half price.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Allows for 2-for-1 ferry fees on weekdays to either Spectacle or Georges Islands.  ALL TICKETS MUST BE PURCHASED ONLINE
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
• May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
• June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
source_phrases: Allows for 2-for-1 ferry fees on weekdays to either Spectacle or Georges Islands.  ALL TICKETS MUST BE PURCHASED ONLINE
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
• May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
• June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
• July 15 - September 1: every day
• September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
• September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham
• June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays
• September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
PLEASE NOTE: You must pick up the pass from the library before going.
Pass admits 1 person free.
Hours of Operation: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM, from Valentine’s Day through Columbus Day.
Ticket sales end at 3:30 PM, and no new customers will be admitted into the exhibits after 3:30 PM. We suggest you arrive no later than 3:00 PM.
Check our Facebook  page for last-minute updates.
To really enjoy our butterflies, plan to spend at least an hour.
source_phrases: PLEASE NOTE: You must pick up the pass from the library before going.
Pass admits 1 person free.
Hours of Operation: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM, from Valentine’s Day through Columbus Day.
Ticket sales end at 3:30 PM, and no new customers will be admitted into the exhibits after 3:30 PM. We suggest you arrive no later than 3:00 PM.
Check our Facebook  page for last-minute updates.
To really enjoy our butterflies, plan to spend at least an hour.
Admission Prices:
Adults: $14.00 Seniors (65+): $12.00 Children (3-12 years): $10.00 Children (2 and under): Free
Prices are subject to change. See our Special Offers page for discounts that may be available to you.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 3 people at half price. ($9.50 instead of $19.00) No payment will be collected online, you will pay when you arrive. 
Note: The museum is closed on Mondays
source_phrases: Pass admits 3 people at half price. ($9.50 instead of $19.00) No payment will be collected online, you will pay when you arrive.
Note: The museum is closed on Mondays

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 children accompanied by 1 or 2 adults for free play in the STEAM Play Space during Drop-in hours. All children must be supervised by an accompanying adult during the entire visit. 
Check the website before you visit because the museum is closed several weekends during the school year, usually the weekends before, after, or during vacation weeks and holidays. Drop-in are also closed during the summer.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 4 children accompanied by 1 or 2 adults for free play in the STEAM Play Space during Drop-in hours. All children must be supervised by an accompanying adult during the entire visit.

Check the website before you visit because the museum is closed several weekends during the school year, usually the weekends before, after, or during vacation weeks and holidays. Drop-in are also closed during the summer.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to 2 people at $10 (a 50% discount). It is not valid toward performances or special events.
Open Tuesdays through Sundays, closed Mondays:
Exhibits include:

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 people for $5 per person .
Museum entry is timed and capacity highly restricted. All tickets are for a specific entry time. You will get two emails, one from the museum with the tickets and one from Assabet with the library pass. There’s nothing to pick up at the library but you will need both emails.
This program is supported in part by a grant from the Wilmington Council for the Arts, a local agency which is supported by the Massachusetts Cultural Council, a state agency
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 4 people for $5 per person .

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 people at $2 per person (children under two are admitted free) Hours of operation vary by sanctuary.
Visitors must reserve their parking spot at Drumlin Farm to ensure access on weekends when they reach capacity.
Check the their website for guidelines and updates before reserving this pass.
Funded by the Community Fund

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows free parking at state parks (except Nahant and Nantasket beaches).
Alphabetical listing of parks .
source_phrases: Pass allows free parking at state parks (except Nahant and Nantasket beaches).
Alphabetical listing of parks .

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 2 adult tickets at $15 per ticket and 4 youth tickets at $15 per ticket (prices is subject to change). Ticketed special exhibits are not included.
There is no physical pass to pick up at the library.
This program is supported in part by a grant from the Wilmington Council for the Arts, a local agency which is supported by the Massachusetts Cultural Council, a state agency.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
The pass admits up to three adults and 3 children for the discounted rates of $20 per adult, $17 per senior, and $15 per youth. 
The hall is open daily from 10 am to 4 pm. But be sure to check their list of early closings before you reserve this pass.
source_phrases: The pass admits up to three adults and 3 children for the discounted rates of $20 per adult, $17 per senior, and $15 per youth.
The hall is open daily from 10 am to 4 pm. But be sure to check their list of early closings before you reserve this pass.

passes.title: Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall Of Fame
passes.benefit_text:
Visiting the Aquarium: Advanced reservations are no longer required. Library patrons should present their coupons on-site at the Aquarium ticket booth. Once tickets are issued, library patrons will be admitted to the Aquarium. Please note that coupons to the Aquarium are valid only on the date printed on the coupon.
For additional questions, please contact the Membership Department at members@neaq.org or 617-226-2184 (weekdays, 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.).
This pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off.
source_phrases: Visiting the Aquarium: Advanced reservations are no longer required. Library patrons should present their coupons on-site at the Aquarium ticket booth. Once tickets are issued, library patrons will be admitted to the Aquarium. Please note that coupons to the Aquarium are valid only on the date printed on the coupon.
For additional questions, please contact the Membership Department at members@neaq.org or 617-226-2184 (weekdays, 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.).
This pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits up to two people at half off general admission. Full prices are weekday $20 and weekend $21.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to two people at half off general admission. Full prices are weekday $20 and weekend $21.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
source_phrases: This pass admits two people for free.
Open Tuesday through Saturday, 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
Exhibits include:
Stitch Punk
Humachine Sculpture
Kaleidoscope Quilts
Yellow Quilts

passes.title: New England Quilt Museum
passes.benefit_text: Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.
source_phrases: Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
source_phrases: The pass admits up to two people for free.
The hall is open daily from 10 am to 5 pm. But be sure to check their site for early closings before you make the reservation here.
The pass also give you a 15% discount at in-store purchases at the Pro Shop as well as 20% discount on Hall special ticketed events.

passes.title: Patriots Hall Of Fame
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 2 adults @ $12 per person for general admission.
source_phrases: This pass admits 2 adults @ $12 per person for general admission.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
source_phrases: The pass admits up to 6 people for $4 off per ticket. Tickets must be purchased the day of your visit.
Full prices are: Adult $19, Senior (62+) $17.50,  Child (3-14) $16
Open daily from 10 am to 5 pm  (July & August from 10 am to 7 pm)
Pass not valid in October
Reserve the pass here, then purchase tickets on the day of your reservation by doing the following.
1.) Pickup the pass at the library
2.) Go to https://tickets.salemwitchmuseum.com/
3.) Agree to terms and click Submit
4.) Choose a time
5,) Chose up to 6 tickets
6.) Click Add selected to cart
7.) Type the code on the pass you picked up in the Enter Coupon Code here
8.) Click Apply Pass
9.) Click Proceed to Checkout
10.) Type you r billing details and credit card number
11.) Click Place order

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits up to 6 people at 50% off.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 6 people at 50% off.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Pass holders will receive free admission to the museum. One pass allows free admission for up to 9 people per day. One pass per party, please. 
Pass must be returned in the book drop by 8:30 am the morning following the reservation.
source_phrases: Pass holders will receive free admission to the museum. One pass allows free admission for up to 9 people per day. One pass per party, please.
Pass must be returned in the book drop by 8:30 am the morning following the reservation.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Payment is collected at the zoo.  Please check the zoo website for special closings.
Please remember to come in and pick up the coupon pass from the library before you go. The confirmation email isn't the pass.
Funded by the Friends of the Library.
